subject: Pesacola weather
body:
Jeffrey,
, it is 30 min driving distance from Pensacola airport  to Pensacola Navel 
Base.
FYI
BUT:  Hurricane Humberto is due west of Pesacola  FL and will be effecting 
the area  Friday afternoon,,,its current track  will pass north of Pensacola and 
will effect our arrival if done later in the  week. 
 
     
_Show Map In Motion_ 
(http://www.weather.com/weather/map/USFL0399?clip=706&region=null&collection=localwxforecast&presname=Pensacola, FL 
Forecast&name=index_large_animated&day=1)   _How to read this map_ 
(http://www.weather.com/common/help/maps/localdoppler.html)     _Pensacola, FL  Forecast_ 
(http://www.weather.com/multimedia/videoplayer.html?clip=706&collection=localwxforecast&from=map
room_video id=)         _National Forecast_
